exercises.name: Incline Push-Up
coachingCues: Keep body straight from head to knees
setupInstructions: Place hands on elevated surface (bench, table, or counter)
Walk feet back to create straight line
executionSteps: Push through palms to return up

exercises.name: Push-Up
coachingCues: Keep your body in a straight line from head to heels
Lower your body until your chest nearly touches the floor
Push through your palms to return to starting position
Keep your core tight throughout the movement
commonMistakes: Sagging hips — keep the body rigid
Flaring elbows too wide — keep elbows at 45 degrees
Incomplete range of motion — go low enough to challenge yourself
Holding your breath — breathe out as you push up
setupInstructions: Start in a plank position with hands shoulder-width apart
Keep feet together or slightly apart for stability
executionSteps: Lower your body in one straight line
Chest should nearly touch the floor at the bottom
Push through your palms to drive back up
Return to starting position without locking elbows

exercises.name: Decline Push-Up
coachingCues: Feet elevated on bench or surface
setupInstructions: Place hands on floor shoulder-width apart

exercises.name: Sumo Squat
setupInstructions: Stand with feet wider than shoulders

exercises.name: Reverse Lunge
coachingCues: Step back and lower rear knee
Push through front heel to return
executionSteps: Lower until rear knee nearly touches floor
Push back to start and alternate

exercises.name: Forward Lunge
coachingCues: Step forward and lower back knee
setupInstructions: Stand upright with feet hip-width apart
Hands on hips or extended forward
executionSteps: Lower hips until rear knee nearly touches ground
Push off front heel to return

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
setupInstructions: Place rear foot on bench behind you
executionSteps: Push through front heel to return

exercises.name: Glute Bridge
coachingCues: Lie on back with knees bent
commonMistakes: Using lower back instead of glutes
setupInstructions: Lie on your back on floor
Knees bent, feet flat and hip-width apart
executionSteps: Thighs and torso in straight line

pregnant_postnatal.note: Avoid supine position after first trimester

exercises.name: Single-Leg Glute Bridge
setupInstructions: Lie on back with knees bent

shoulder_injury.note: Hands behind head may strain shoulders

neck_issues.note: Do not place hands behind head

lower_back_pain.note: Start with small range of motion only

neck_issues.note: Keep neck neutral, look at floor

exercises.name: Dead Bug
coachingCues: Lie on back with arms up
Lower back stays glued to floor
setupInstructions: Lie on your back on floor
executionSteps: Extend right arm and left leg

lower_back_pain.note: Stop if lower back pain occurs

exercises.name: Bird Dog
executionSteps: Extend right arm and left leg

exercises.name: Plank
coachingCues: Straight line from head to heels

exercises.name: Plank Shoulder Tap
executionSteps: Tap right shoulder with left hand
Tap left shoulder with right hand

exercises.name: Crunch
setupInstructions: Lie on back with knees bent

exercises.name: Bicycle Crunch
setupInstructions: Lie on back with knees bent
executionSteps: Bring right elbow toward left knee

lower_back_pain.note: Bend knees if lower back hurts

exercises.name: Russian Twist
setupInstructions: Sit on floor with knees bent

exercises.name: V-Up
executionSteps: Bring arms and legs up together

lower_back_pain.note: Raise legs higher to reduce lower back stress

exercises.name: Jumping Jacks
executionSteps: Jump while spreading legs and raising arms
Land softly on balls of feet

exercises.name: Butt Kicks
executionSteps: Run in place while kicking heels up

exercises.name: Burpee
executionSteps: Squat down and place hands on floor
Jump or step feet back into plank

exercises.name: Inchworm
setupInstructions: Stand upright with feet hip-width apart
executionSteps: Hinge at hips and touch hands to floor

wrist_pain.note: Skip the plank portion or use fists

exercises.name: Hip Flexor Stretch
setupInstructions: Hands on front leg or floor
executionSteps: Feel stretch in back leg hip

knee_injury.note: Use a cushion under the knee or perform standing version

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
executionSteps: Cow: drop hips and chest, look up gently
Cat: round spine, tuck chin, draw belly in

exercises.name: Front Raise
setupInstructions: Stand upright with feet hip-width apart

exercises.name: Dumbbell Row
setupInstructions: One knee on bench or standing

exercises.name: Renegade Row
coachingCues: Row one side at a time
setupInstructions: Plank position with hands on dumbbells

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lunge
setupInstructions: Stand upright with dumbbells at sides

exercises.name: Dumbbell Step-Up
executionSteps: Drive through front leg to stand

exercises.name: Hammer Curl
setupInstructions: Stand upright with feet hip-width apart

exercises.name: Concentration Curl
setupInstructions: Sit on bench with feet flat

exercises.name: Overhead Tricep Extension
setupInstructions: Hold dumbbell overhead with both hands

exercises.name: Arnold Press
executionSteps: Rotate palms outward as you press

exercises.name: Band Pull-Apart
setupInstructions: Hold band in front at chest height

exercises.name: Band Bicep Curl
setupInstructions: Stand on band with both feet

exercises.name: Band Squat
setupInstructions: Stand on band with both feet

exercises.name: Band Lateral Walk
setupInstructions: Place band around both legs above knees

exercises.name: Band Row
setupInstructions: Sit on floor with band around feet
Band anchored or wrapped around object

exercises.name: Dead Hang
setupInstructions: Grip bar with hands slightly wider than shoulders
executionSteps: Let body hang with engaged shoulders

wrist_pain.note: Use neutral grip or avoid if severe

exercises.name: Negative Pull-Up
setupInstructions: Jump to top of pull-up position

exercises.name: Hanging Knee Raise
setupInstructions: Hang from pull-up bar with overhand grip

exercises.name: Barbell Back Squat
executionSteps: Break at knees and hips simultaneously

exercises.name: Kettlebell Turkish Get-Up
setupInstructions: Lie on back with kettlebell in one hand
